title: Dara's First Day Friends
synopsis: When Dara feels scared on her first day at animal school, she discovers that making friends can turn a frightening day into a happy adventure.

pages.text: Dara the little bear felt scared. Today was her first day at Forest School! Her tummy felt funny and her paws were shaky. "I don't want to go," she whispered to Mama Bear.

illustration.description: A small brown bear cub with worried eyes and drooped ears stands next to a larger mama bear. They're outside a colorful school building with a rainbow door. Dara clutches her yellow backpack nervously. The background has soft green trees and blue sky with puffy white clouds.
illustration.alt: Scared little bear Dara with her mama outside Forest School

pages.text: "Being scared is okay," said Mama Bear with a warm hug. "But you might find friends who feel just like you do. Be brave, little one." Mama Bear gave Dara a gentle push toward the big red door.

illustration.description: Mama bear giving Dara a comforting hug with loving eyes and a gentle smile. Dara looks slightly less worried but still uncertain. The school entrance shows other small animal children walking in - a rabbit, a fox, and an owl. Warm yellow sunlight creates a hopeful mood.
illustration.alt: Mama bear hugging scared Dara encouragingly at school entrance

pages.text: Inside the classroom, Dara saw many animal children. A little rabbit sat alone in the corner, looking sad. A small fox hid behind his chair, looking scared just like Dara felt.

illustration.description: A bright classroom with colorful alphabet letters on yellow walls. Dara stands in the doorway looking around. A gray rabbit sits sadly at a blue table, while an orange fox peeks nervously from behind a red chair. Other diverse animal children are scattered around - an owl, a deer, and a squirrel.
illustration.alt: Dara observing her new classroom full of animal friends

pages.text: "Hi," Dara said softly to the rabbit. "I'm Dara. Are you scared too?" The rabbit nodded. "I'm Luna," she whispered. "I don't know anyone here." The little fox peeked out. "I'm Finn," he said quietly.

illustration.description: Three small animals sitting together at a round green table. Dara the brown bear looks kind and friendly, Luna the gray rabbit has hopeful eyes, and Finn the orange fox is starting to come out from behind his chair. Their expressions show the beginning of friendship forming.
illustration.alt: Dara, Luna the rabbit, and Finn the fox introducing themselves

pages.text: The three new friends played with colorful blocks together. They painted pictures and sang songs. Dara felt happy instead of scared! "This is fun!" she laughed. Luna and Finn smiled big smiles too.

illustration.description: The three friends sitting on a soft blue rug, building a tall tower with bright red, yellow, and green blocks. All three animals have joyful expressions with big smiles. Paint brushes and colorful artwork are scattered around them. The classroom is filled with warm, cheerful lighting.
illustration.alt: Dara, Luna, and Finn playing happily with blocks and art supplies

pages.text: When Mama Bear came to pick up Dara, she was surprised. "You look so happy!" she said. "I was scared, but then I was brave," Dara said proudly. "And I found the best friends ever!" Tomorrow couldn't come fast enough.

illustration.description: Dara running excitedly toward Mama Bear at the school door, her face glowing with happiness. Luna and Finn wave goodbye from behind, also smiling brightly. The school hallway is decorated with children's colorful artwork on the walls. Golden afternoon light streams through windows creating a warm, joyful atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Happy Dara reuniting with Mama Bear while her new friends wave goodbye

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Dara feel on her first day of school?
questions.explanation: Dara felt scared on her first day because she didn't know anyone and everything was new.

questions.question: What did Mama Bear tell Dara to do?
questions.explanation: Mama Bear encouraged Dara to be brave and told her she might find friends who feel the same way.

questions.question: Who were Dara's new friends?
choices: Luna the rabbit and Finn the fox
questions.explanation: Dara became friends with Luna the rabbit and Finn the fox, who were also feeling scared.

questions.question: How did Dara feel at the end of the day?
questions.explanation: Dara felt happy at the end because she made new friends and had fun playing together.

pages.text: Fill in the missing words: Dara felt _____ on her first day, but Mama Bear told her to be _____. She made friends and felt _____ at the end!
